items.title: PEC Zwolle als het medicijn voor het uitsyndroom van Ajax
items.summary: Ajax is dit seizoen bezig aan een van zijn slechtste uitreeksen in deze eeuw, maar treft in PEC Zwolle een tegenstander die vaak wordt verslagen, ook in Overijssel.

items.title: Engelse media zien 'lente' bij Liverpool: 'Arteta zal jaloers zijn op Slot'
items.summary: Engelse media hebben het idee dat Arne Slot Liverpool inmiddels op de rails heeft gezet op weg naar de ontknoping van een voor The Reds vrij turbulent seizoen. De huidige nummer vijf in de Premier League bleek zaterdag tegen West Ham United uiterst effectief bij standaardsituaties. Eerder deze jaargang ging het juist vaak mis voor Slot bij corners, vrije trappen en ingooien.

items.title: Kane eyes Lewa goal record after Klassiker brace
items.summary: Harry Kane is targeting Robert Lewandowski's Bundesliga record of 41 goals in a season after notching another two in Bayern Munich's 3-2 win over Borussia Dortmund on Saturday.

items.title: Pep condemns boos during Ramadan fasting break
items.summary: A first-half stoppage allowing players who are observing Ramadan to break their fast was booed by sections of Leeds United supporters at Elland Road.

items.title: USMNT starlet Banks considering Germany switch
items.summary: U.S. youth national team starlet Noahkai Banks, a potential pick for this summer's senior World Cup squad, has said he is still considering whether his international future lies with the U.S. or Germany.

items.title: Barça's Yamal after 1st hat trick: I'm happy again
items.summary: Lamine Yamal has revealed he has not felt good this season but says he is finally enjoying football again after scoring the first hat trick of his career

items.title: Sources: Thorns hire ex-Spurs coach Vilahamn
items.summary: The Portland Thorns have hired Robert Vilahamn as head coach, multiple sources confirmed to ESPN, after a lengthy search.

items.title: Vitessenaar Hoogewerf droomt van Nigeriaanse interlands: 'Cultuur ligt mij beter'
items.summary: Dillon Hoogewerf droomt van een interlandloopbaan bij Nigeria. De 22-jarige buitenspeler van Vitesse is in Nederland geboren, maar wil graag ooit uitkomen voor het land waar zijn moeder vandaan komt. 'Ik wil daar mensen helpen.'

items.title: Toen Davids en Collins John neerstreken in de kelder van het Engelse profvoetbal
items.summary: In de rubriek VI-Tijdmachine brengen we met regelmaat nieuwe verhalen over toen, en elke dag van het weekeinde herplaatsen we een artikelen uit ons rijke archief. Deze keer gaan we terug naar de herfst van 2012, toen Edgar Davids zich verbond aan Barnet.

items.title: NEC verliest weer van Fortuna: 'Verdedigend een van de beste ploegen'
items.summary: NEC liep zaterdag op eigen veld voor de tweede keer dit seizoen tegen een nederlaag aan tegen Fortuna Sittard. De ploeg van trainer Danny Buijs bleek opnieuw een plaag voor de Nijmegenaren, die dit seizoen zo veel lof krijgen. Fortuna had daar geen boodschap aan en won met 2-3 in Nijmegen.

items.title: European football: Kane double helps Bayern Munich sink Borussia Dortmund
items.summary: England captain scores twice in 3-2 win in Der Klassiker Lamine Yamal fires hat-trick in Barça win over Villarreal Harry Kane scored twice again and Bayern Munich opened an 11-point lead in the Bundesliga with a 3-2 win at Borussia Dortmund in Der Klassiker on Saturday. Joshua Kimmich let fly with his left boot to score the winner with a volley in the 87th minute, just four minutes after Daniel Svensson equalised for Dortmund with a brilliant volley inside the left post. Nico Schlotterbeck put Dortmund 1-0 up at the break, but Serge Gnabry set up Kane’s response and the England captain got his second from the penalty spot – after a foul by Schlotterbeck on Josip Stanisic – to take his league tally to 30 goals this season. Continue reading...

items.title: Carrick not interested in personal Glasner duel
items.summary: Manchester United interim boss Michael Carrick comes up against one of the major contenders for the permanent job when Oliver Glasner's Crystal Palace go to Old Trafford on Sunday.

items.title: Free-scoring Semenyo takes burden off Haaland
items.summary: Manchester City have often been accused of being too reliant on Erling Haaland this season. There are signs that could be changing.

items.title: Pep Guardiola condemns fans who booed as Muslim players broke Ramadan fast at Leeds
items.summary: Section of fans reacted as play paused at Elland Road Guardiola: ‘Respect the religion, respect the diversity’ Leeds coach calls it ‘disappointing … we need to do better’ Pep Guardiola has called on football supporters to “respect religion and diversity” after fans booed a brief stoppage in play at Elland Road to allow Muslim players to break their Ramadan fast. Play was halted in the 13th minute of Manchester City’s 1-0 win against Leeds after the sun had set to allow the Muslim players to eat. At this point, despite a clear message on the big screen, fans audibly jeered the situation. Continue reading...

items.title: New set-piece kings Liverpool can still achieve 'something beautiful'
items.summary: Liverpool boosted their Champions League hopes with a 5-2 win against West Ham, helped by three goals from set-pieces in the first half.

items.title: 'Not fair to fans' - how VAR denied Burnley one of greatest comebacks
items.summary: Burnley were set to complete one of the greatest Premier League comebacks - until VAR intervened. BBC Sport takes a look at whether the decisions were correct.

items.title: Spring in Sesko’s step is thanks to Carrick scrapping Amorim’s tactical stranglehold | Jonathan Wilson
items.summary: The starkest improvement under the interim manager has been the Slovenian supersub’s attacking potency Benjamin Sesko’s career at Manchester United breaks into two distinct periods. In the first, he played 1,404 minutes of football and scored two goals. In the second, he has played 274 minutes and scored six goals: 702 minutes per goal and then 45 minutes 40 seconds per goal. There’s a very obvious explanation. On 4 January, Sesko toiled in a 1-1 draw at Leeds. He didn’t manage a shot on target. He completed only 76% of his passes. He didn’t attempt a dribble but still lost possession five times. He was caught offside twice. On 5 January, Ruben Amorim was sacked. Continue reading...

items.title: Lowry takes joint lead of Cognizant Classic with Smotherman
items.summary: Shane Lowry moved into a share of the lead after the third round of the Cognizant Classic with a bogey-free, eight-under round of 63.

items.title: Man City beat Leeds to close gap on league leaders Arsenal
items.summary: FREE TO WATCH: Highlights from Leeds United’s match against Manchester City in the Premier League.

items.title: Celtic and Rangers face double jeopardy in derby like no other
items.summary: BBC Scotland chief sportswriter Tom English sets the scene going into a compelling Old Firm spectacle on Sunday.
